scripts.build: node -r dotenv/config -e "const fs = require('fs'); let js = fs.readFileSync('my-token-website/script.js', 'utf8'); if (process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY) { js = js.replace('__GEMINI_API_KEY__', process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY); fs.writeFileSync('my-token-website/script.js', js); console.log('Successfully injected GEMINI_API_KEY into script.js.'); } else { console.log('Warning: GEMINI_API_KEY is not defined in the environment. Skipping key injection.'); }"
